valid_packets.hypothesis_statement: A candidate discovery packet becomes more testable when context-switch events are represented as transitions between typed states rather than as unstructured narrative summaries.
valid_packets.novelty_basis: The claim adds a new representational requirement: transition typing should increase downstream testability compared with prose-only capture.
valid_packets.mechanism_hint: Typed state transitions constrain which variables, alternatives, and falsification routes can be attached to a packet.

measurable_variables.name: testable_variable_count
measurable_variables.operational_definition: Number of variables with units or explicit measurement rules attached to a packet.

measurable_variables.name: valid_falsification_route_present
measurable_variables.operational_definition: Boolean indicating whether an observable failure condition is specified.

alternative_explanations: Improved testability may come from stricter templates rather than transition typing.
Improved testability may come from evaluator bias toward structured records rather than actual discovery value.
valid_packets.missingness: Needs paired evaluation against prose-only packets and transition-typed packets.
valid_packets.revision_reason: Create a testable bridge from unresolved phenomenon mapping to mechanism generation.
valid_packets.falsification_route: If transition-typed packets do not increase valid variable count or falsification-route presence compared with prose-only packets, reject or revise the claim.
valid_packets.next_executable_action: Generate matched prose-only and transition-typed synthetic packets and score both with the pipeline regression runner.

packet.hypothesis_statement: A packet about a named person at a specific address should pass.
packet.mechanism_hint: Private details are used as mechanism evidence.
packet.falsification_route: Reject if privacy scanner detects prohibited terms.
